commands.agent: Start single interaction or interactive mode

agent.start: MiniBot.go Interactive Mode Started (type 'exit' or 'quit' to leave)
agent.stopped: [Agent stopped: reached maximum tool iteration limit]

tools.write_file: Overwrite or create a file with given content
tools.append_file: Append content to the end of a file
tools.edit_file: Replace content in a line range (1-indexed, inclusive)
tools.execute_command: Execute a shell command and return its output
tools.web_search: Search the web for information using DuckDuckGo

tool_params.path: Path to the file relative to workspace
tool_params.path_or_content: Path or content depending on the tool
tool_params.new_content: New content to replace within the range

warnings.sensitive_data: WARNING: Sensitive data detected in config file. Do NOT commit config.json with real API keys or tokens to version control!
warnings.config_permissions: WARNING: Config file %s has overly permissive permissions (%o). Consider restricting to 0600.
warnings.workspace_permissions: WARNING: Workspace directory %s has overly permissive permissions (%o). Consider restricting to 0700.
